articles.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
articles.subtitle: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.
articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.summary: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.
body: Siri’s AI overhaul may have been the headline announcement at Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference earlier this month, but Apple’s broader AI strategy is taking shape through a series of smaller features embedded across its software.

Rather than asking consumers to adopt the new AI-powered version of Siri to get all the benefits that AI brings, the company is weaving AI into the apps and services people already use, with a focus on solving real-world problems. The result is that your iPhone will be able to split restaurant bills among friends, secure your passwords after data breaches, automate tasks, and organize information with less manual effort, among other things.

Individually, these features may not be as dramatic as a Siri that finally understands your personal context and can take action on your behalf. But combined, they showcase a vision for AI that’s less about chatting with a bot and more about making Apple’s software itself feel smarter and more capable.

Beyond Siri AI , here are the smaller AI features in iOS 27 that we’re most looking forward to using. The features are live now in the developer beta and will soon arrive in the public beta, before iOS 27’s general public release later this fall.

When iOS 27 rolls out later this fall, customers will be able to split the restaurant bill using Apple Cash. Powered by Apple Intelligence, you simply take a photo of the receipt (or upload a photo), and you’ll then see a new option that lets you choose to split the bill with others. Apple Intelligence works to extract the key details from the bill, like the items ordered and the quantities, the tip, and the total. You can choose the items you ordered from the receipt and then share a request for others to do the same by messaging the group chat. Others can select their items and quantities — even selecting a half (1/2) if they split with another. To pay, you double-click just as you would for any other Apple Cash transaction.

The bill-splitting option doesn’t feel complicated because it only shows up when it’s needed and works with existing apps and services people already know, like Messages and Apple Cash. It’s also smart enough to request everyone’s share of the tax and tip along with the item prices.

Thanks to password managers like Apple’s Passwords app or others from third parties like 1Password, Dashlane, or Bitwarden, you’ve now likely created complex passwords that aren’t prone to being easily guessed. Unfortunately, that’s no longer enough to keep passwords secure. As numerous data breaches have shown us over the years, your passwords often still end up in the hands of bad actors through no fault of your own.

Apple’s new password-updating feature will now leverage AI to agentically take action on users’ behalf by identifying both weak and compromised passwords — like those found in a data breach. Instead of forcing you to manually update your passwords, the feature securely navigates websites, signing in and upgrading your passwords to new, more secure versions.

If you thought the feature that automatically displays the SMS passcode you need to sign into a website right above the keyboard is one of the best things Apple has ever introduced, you’re going to like the new one-tap suggestions in iOS 27.

Using Apple Intelligence, the Messages app will offer a variety of one-tap suggestions based on the topics of users’ conversations. For instance, if a friend texts to ask you to bring them something when you meet up, the one-tap suggestion might ask if you’d like to add the request to your reminders. If someone asks you to share the photos from an event, Apple Intelligence can suggest the right photos to send using its understanding of keywords, locations, and the people in their Photos Library. Or, if you’re planning a dinner date or work meeting, Messages can prompt you to add the event to your Calendar. And so on.
Again, the feature itself just appears like a useful tool in your chat, not as an obviously AI-powered addition.

Another under-the-radar option coming in iOS 27 will make phone calls with companies’ customer service departments slightly less stressful, as it will surface necessary information you may need to provide the business rep who answers. For instance, if you’re calling about your airline reservation, the Call Context feature will display your confirmation code directly on the call screen.
keyPoints: Siri’s AI overhaul may have been the headline announcement at Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference earlier this month, but Apple’s broader AI strategy is taking shape through a series of smaller features embedded across its software.

Rather than asking consumers to adopt the new AI-powered version of Siri to get all the benefits that AI brings, the company is weaving AI into the apps and services people already use, with a focus on solving real-world problems. The result is that your iPhone will be able to split restaurant bills among friends, secure your passwords after data breaches, automate tasks, and organize information with less manual effort, among other things.

Individually, these features may not be as dramatic as a Siri that finally understands your personal context and can take action on your behalf. But combined, they showcase a vision for AI that’s less about chatting with a bot and more about making Apple’s software itself feel smarter and more capable.
paragraphTranslations: Siri的AI改革可能是本月早些时候苹果全球开发者大会的头条公告，但苹果更广泛的AI战略正通过一系列较小的功能在其软件中形成。
公司不是要求消费者采用新的AI驱动版本的Siri来获得AI带来的所有好处，而是将AI编织进人们已经使用的应用程序和服务中，重点是解决现实世界的问题。结果是，你的iPhone将能够在朋友之间拆分餐厅账单，数据泄露后保护你的密码，自动化任务，并以更少的手动努力组织信息等。
单独来看，这些功能可能不如最终理解你个人情境并代表你采取行动的Siri那样引人注目。但结合起来，它们展示了一个AI愿景，这个愿景不是关于与机器人聊天，而是更多地关于使苹果的软件本身感觉更智能、更有能力。
除了Siri AI，以下是我们最期待在iOS 27中使用的较小AI功能。这些功能现在已在开发者测试版中上线，并将很快出现在公共测试版中，随后iOS 27将在今秋晚些时候向公众发布。

当iOS 27在今年秋季晚些时候推出时，客户将能够使用Apple Cash拆分餐厅账单。由Apple Intelligence提供支持，你只需拍摄收据的照片（或上传照片），然后你将看到一个新选项，让你选择与他人拆分账单。Apple Intelligence致力于从账单中提取关键细节，如订购的商品和数量、小费和总计。你可以选择收据上你订购的商品，然后通过群聊消息分享请求，让其他人也这样做。其他人可以选择他们的物品和数量——甚至选择一半（1/2），如果他们与另一个人拆分的话。支付时，你只需双击，就像处理任何其他Apple Cash交易一样。
拆分账单选项并不复杂，因为它只在需要时出现，并与人们已经熟悉的现有应用程序和服务（如消息和Apple Cash）一起工作。它还足够智能，可以要求每个人连同商品价格一起支付税款和小费的份额。
得益于密码管理器，如苹果的密码应用或第三方的1Password、Dashlane或Bitwarden等，你现在已经可能创建了不容易被轻易猜到的复杂密码。不幸的是，这已不再足以保证密码的安全。正如多年来众多数据泄露事件向我们展示的那样，你的密码常常仍然会落入坏人之手，这不是你的错。
苹果的新密码更新功能现在将利用AI来代表用户识别出弱密码和泄露的密码——比如那些在数据泄露中发现的密码。该功能不是强迫你手动更新你的密码，而是安全地导航网站，登录并升级你的密码到新的、更安全的版本。
如果你认为自动显示你需要登录网站的短信验证码的功能是苹果引入的最好功能之一，你会喜欢iOS 27中的新一键建议。

使用Apple Intelligence，消息应用将根据用户对话的主题提供各种一键建议。例如，如果朋友发短信让你在见面时给他们带点东西，一键建议可能会问你是否想将请求添加到你的提醒事项中。如果有人要求你分享某个活动的图片，Apple Intelligence可以建议发送正确的图片，利用其对关键词、地点和他们的相册中人物的理解。或者，如果你正在计划一个晚餐约会或工作会议，消息可以提示你将事件添加到你的日历中。以此类推。
再次强调，该功能本身就像你聊天中的一个有用工具，而不是一个明显的AI驱动的附加功能。
iOS 27中即将到来的另一个低调选项将使与公司客户服务部门的电话通话稍微减轻压力，因为它会显示你可能需要提供给接听业务代表的必要信息。例如，如果你正在拨打关于你的航空公司预订的电话，呼叫上下文功能将直接在通话屏幕上显示你的确认代码。

paragraphs: Apple's AI strategy is being integrated into everyday apps and services on the iPhone, not just Siri. These new features aim to solve real-world problems with less manual effort. iOS 27 will allow users to split restaurant bills using Apple Cash. By taking a photo of the receipt, Apple Intelligence extracts bill details and calculates each person's share. The update also includes a password-updating feature that uses AI to identify weak or compromised passwords and updates them automatically. Additionally, Messages will offer one-tap suggestions based on conversation topics, and a Call Context feature will display necessary information during customer service calls.
These smaller AI features in iOS 27 are expected to make Apple's software feel smarter and more capable, rather than just chatting with a bot.
paragraphTranslations: 苹果的人工智能战略正在被整合到iPhone的日常应用程序和服务中，不仅仅是Siri。这些新功能旨在用更少的手动操作解决现实世界的问题。iOS 27将允许用户使用Apple Cash拆分餐厅账单。通过拍摄收据照片，苹果智能提取账单详情并计算每个人的份额。更新还包括一个使用人工智能识别薄弱或泄露密码并自动更新它们的密码更新功能。此外，信息应用将根据对话主题提供一键式建议，呼叫上下文功能将在客户服务电话期间显示必要的信息。
这些iOS 27中的较小人工智能功能预计将使苹果的软件感觉更智能、更有能力，而不仅仅是与机器人聊天。

articles.title: Trump and Iran's negotiator trade warnings as talks held in Switzerland
articles.subtitle: The US president, who is not at the talks, threatens to attack Iran if it does not restrain Hezbollah in Lebanon.
articles.author: BBC World
articles.summary: The US president, who is not at the talks, threatens to attack Iran if it does not restrain Hezbollah in Lebanon.
body: President Donald Trump has exchanged warnings with Iran's lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf as a first round of direct talks was held in Switzerland after the countries signed an initial agreement to end the war.
Trump threatened to attack Iran if it did not restrain the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah, which has been clashing with Israeli troops in southern Lebanon.
In response, Ghalibaf dismissed the threat and said Iran's armed forces were prepared for confrontation.

Last week's initial agreement includes a commitment to reach a final deal within 60 days, as well as an end to fighting on "all fronts" - including in Lebanon - and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

However, there has since been an upsurge in fighting between Hezbollah and Israeli forces in southern Lebanon, and Israeli air strikes that the health ministry says have killed dozens of Lebanese including women and children.

That escalation led the US to declare a new ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah on Friday. Continued clashes and air strikes prompted Iran on Saturday to announce it had shut the Strait of Hormuz - though tracking data shows vessels have continued to pass through it.

As the talks in Lucerne between the US and Iranian delegations began, Trump posted that Iran "must immediately stop their highly paid PROXIES in Lebanon from causing trouble" and threatened to "hit Iran very hard again" if they did not.
Ghalibaf responded by saying: "Don't they think that if their threats had any effect, they wouldn't be in this desperate situation today?... No matter how much they talk, it is we who take action."

On Sunday, fighting was reported to have diminished but Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu insisted that the Israeli military would remain in southern Lebanon for as long as is necessary to protect northern Israel.
Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem has rejected any Israeli military presence in southern Lebanon and said Hezbollah would defend itself.
Speaking before the talks at the Swiss resort of Bürgenstock, US lead negotiator Vice-President JD Vance said Trump had asked negotiators to "turn over a new leaf".

He added that if Iran's leadership was willing to give up being a "driver of regional instability" and "nuclear weapons ambitions for the longer term", then the US "is willing to fundamentally transform our relationship with that country".
keyPoints: President Donald Trump has exchanged warnings with Iran's lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf as a first round of direct talks was held in Switzerland after the countries signed an initial agreement to end the war.
Trump threatened to attack Iran if it did not restrain the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah, which has been clashing with Israeli troops in southern Lebanon.
In response, Ghalibaf dismissed the threat and said Iran's armed forces were prepared for confrontation.
paragraphTranslations: 唐纳德·特朗普总统与伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴盖尔·加利巴夫交换了警告，此前两国在瑞士举行了首轮直接会谈，并签署了一项初步协议以结束战争。
特朗普威胁说，如果伊朗不限制与以色列军队在黎巴嫩南部发生冲突的黎巴嫩武装组织真主党，他将攻击伊朗。
作为回应，加利巴夫驳回了这一威胁，并表示伊朗武装力量已准备好对抗。
上周的初步协议包括在60天内达成最终协议的承诺，以及在“所有战线”——包括黎巴嫩——结束战斗，以及重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。
然而，自那以后，真主党和以色列军队在黎巴嫩南部的战斗激增，以色列的空袭导致卫生部表示已经造成包括妇女和儿童在内的数十名黎巴嫩人死亡。
这一升级导致美国在周五宣布以色列和真主党之间的新停火。持续的冲突和空袭促使伊朗在周六宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡——尽管追踪数据显示船只仍在通过。
随着在卢塞恩举行的美国和伊朗代表团之间的会谈开始，特朗普发文称伊朗“必须立即停止他们在黎巴嫩支付高薪的代理人制造麻烦”，并威胁说如果他们不这样做，将“再次非常严厉地打击伊朗”。
加利巴夫回应说：“他们不认为如果他们的威胁有任何效果，他们今天就不会处于这种绝望的境地吗？……不管他们怎么说，是我们采取行动。”
周日，据报道战斗有所减少，但以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡坚持说，以色列军队将留在黎巴嫩南部，只要有必要保护以色列北部。
真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆拒绝了以色列在黎巴嫩南部的任何军事存在，并表示真主党将自卫。
在美国首席谈判代表副总统JD·万斯在瑞士布尔根斯托克度假胜地的会谈前发表讲话时说，特朗普已要求谈判代表“翻开新的一页”。
他补充说，如果伊朗领导层愿意放弃成为“地区不稳定的驱动力”和“长期核武器野心”，那么美国“愿意从根本上改变我们与该国的关系”。

vocabulary.example: The confrontation between the two countries escalated into a war.
vocabulary.exampleZh: 两国之间的对抗升级为战争。

vocabulary.example: Both sides agreed to a temporary ceasefire.
vocabulary.exampleZh: 双方同意暂时停火。

vocabulary.exampleZh: 事件发生后情况迅速升级。

vocabulary.exampleZh: 代表团抵达进行和平谈判。

paragraphs: President Donald Trump and Iran's lead negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, exchanged warnings during the first round of direct talks in Switzerland. Trump threatened to attack Iran if it didn't restrain Hezbollah, a Lebanese armed group clashing with Israeli troops. Ghalibaf dismissed the threat, stating Iran's forces were ready for confrontation. The initial agreement signed last week aimed to end fighting in all regions, including Lebanon, and reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 60 days. Despite this, fighting escalated, leading to a new ceasefire declared by the US. Iran announced the Strait of Hormuz's closure, but ships continued to pass. Trump demanded Iran stop Hezbollah's actions, threatening further attacks. Ghalibaf responded that Iran takes action, not words.
paragraphTranslations: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴格·加利巴夫在瑞士举行的第一轮直接会谈中交换了警告。特朗普威胁说，如果不限制与以色列军队冲突的黎巴嫩武装团体真主党，他将攻击伊朗。加利巴夫对这一威胁不予理会，表示伊朗军队已准备好对抗。上周签署的初步协议旨在结束所有地区的战斗，包括黎巴嫩，并在60天内重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。尽管如此，战斗升级，导致美国宣布新的停火。伊朗宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡，但船只继续通过。特朗普要求伊朗停止真主党的行动，威胁进一步攻击。加利巴夫回应说，伊朗采取行动，而不是空谈。

ba450bda7dfc43c16a2d0faa0391ba6c44c96101.trump: 唐纳德·特朗普，美国第45任总统
